content.en:
As the transcendental realm of the third realm, the three treasures left behind by the master of the Kuntong Realm are naturally very extraordinary, each of which is extremely precious, enough for the extradimensional realm of the second realm to snatch desperately.

The first treasure is the Extradimensional Boundary Stone.

The value of this treasure is to let the extra-dimensional realm of the second realm impact the third realm, and use it to open up the extra-dimensional realm in the body, and some extra-dimensional boundary stones can open up a more perfect extra-dimensional realm, as well as increase the success rate of breakthroughs, and its value is unimaginable.

The second treasure is the Golem Inheritance.

The spirit golem inheritance of the Kuntong Realm Lord is a spirit golem that can build an extradimensional realm, provided that you find enough materials and comprehend the extradimensional rules, you can create a spirit golem comparable to the extradimensional realm.

And in this inheritance, the highest spirit puppet of the third realm can be refined, but even the master of the Kuntong Realm himself has not refined the spirit puppet of the third realm.

However, the Kuntong Realm Lord at his peak had refined hundreds of spirit puppets of the second realm, but unfortunately they were all destroyed by the enemy, and even the spirit puppets of the first realm were destroyed, leaving only those spirit puppets of the half-step transcendent realm.

The third treasure was a black statue, its material was extremely tough, and even the extradimensional realm of the third realm could not be destroyed, but even the Kun Bronze Realm Lord could not study the value of this statue.

When the space-time projection of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord was about to dissipate, he introduced: "This statue is the most valuable treasure, I was ambushed by the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and his purpose is this statue. Unfortunately, I didn't find out its value until I fell. The Lord of the Holy Sea Realm may know his true value, and it is rumored that this statue involves the secrets of the Fourth or even Fifth Realm. "

After saying that, the projection of the Kuntong Realm Lord dissipated.

"Involving the secrets of the fourth and fifth realms!"

Ye Tian took this statue and studied it carefully, but he couldn't study it.

A third-realm extradimensional realm can't be studied for countless years, and he naturally can't study it either.

"Let's study it later!"

He put all three treasures away.

At present, the extra-dimensional boundary stone and the black statue are of little use to him, but the spirit golem inheritance is more valuable.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian searched carefully again, but there was nothing in this palace.

The corpse of the Kuntong Realm Lord also annihilated itself after its projection dissipated.

"It seems that during the battle between the Kuntong Realm Lord and the Holy Sea Realm Lord, the treasures on their bodies were all exhausted or destroyed, and in the end, only these three treasures remained. "

Ye Tian secretly regretted.

Otherwise, the wealth of a third realm transcendent realm, how huge it must be!

Next.

He was in this palace to comprehend the spirit puppet inheritance, from the spirit puppet refining method of the half-step transcendent realm to the spirit puppet refining method of the first transcendent realm, he carefully studied it.

As for the spirit puppet refining methods of the second and third realms, they were too mysterious, and he couldn't even understand them.

"The spirit puppet of the first transcendent realm also needs to comprehend the extradimensional rules before it can be refined, otherwise even if it understands the method of refining, it will not be able to refine it. "

He focused on the study of half-step transcendent realm spirit puppets, if such spirit puppets were refined, they would be of great use.

After a period of time, Ye Tian comprehended the refining method of the half-step transcendent realm spirit puppet, but he couldn't refine it yet, because he still lacked materials.

Outside the palace.

Those spirit puppets have long been turned into ashes, this is also the means of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord, once a strong person obtains three treasures, all the spirit puppets will be annihilated, leaving no one.

The reason why they were not kept for Ye Tian was because these spirit puppets were all refined by the Kun Copper Realm Lord, and they contained a trace of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord, and if they were taken out, they would be easily exposed.

There are many spirit puppet refining inheritances in the outside world, but the spirit puppet that contains the traces of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord is too iconic, once it is known by the Holy Sea Realm Lord or his subordinates, it will inevitably be guessed that he has obtained the inheritance of the Kun Bronze Realm Lord and obtained the black statue.

So.

The Kuntong Realm Lord simply annihilated these spirit puppets.

Anyway, Ye Tian has obtained the spirit puppet inheritance, and he can refine the spirit puppet of the half-step transcendent realm by himself, so the spirit puppet that he has personally refined is naturally no problem.

......

Polar Yang Realm.

Ye Tian began to buy the materials needed to refine the spirit puppet in the chambers of commerce that sold materials, so that his purpose could not be exposed.

And he himself has some materials, so these materials do not need to be purchased.

In a short period of time, he had purchased about enough materials to refine a hundred half-step extradimensional realm spirit puppets, and the amount of extradimensional treasure coins spent was also unimaginable for the half-step extradimensional realm.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian sent these materials to the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory through the Domain Breaking Boundary Star Array.

"Start refining the half-step Extradimensional Realm Spirit Golem!"

In order to ensure that he could refine successfully, he also used the strange blood pupil to analyze and deduce, confirming that he had reached a thorough understanding of the refining method of the spirit puppet inheritance.

After that, he began to refine the half-step Transcendent Realm Spirit Golem. []

To refine a half-step extra-dimensional realm spirit puppet, you need flames to smelt those materials, ordinary flames are not enough, it is best to fuse flame-type extra-dimensional things.

And Ye Tian was also ready early, he bought a super-dimensional thing-the Flame of the Underworld, this extra-dimensional thing is very powerful, but it also has some flaws, that is, it will cause damage to the super-dimensional Dao species.

Under normal circumstances, it is impossible for the general half-step super-dimensional realm to fuse this super-dimensional flame, only those half-step super-dimensional realms that are impossible to break through and do not need to fight, under the arrangement of the super-dimensional realm, will fuse the super-dimensional flame to refine some (good) spirit puppets and super-dimensional secret treasures for the forces.

Ye Tian didn't care about copying his body, so he dared to buy the Flame of the Underworld.

Fortunately, the demand for this thing is not high, and there are side effects, so there is a lot of stock, and he can easily buy it.

Soon.

Ye Tian used the flame of the Dark Yan to smelt one material after another, and then with the assistance of the spirit puppet inheritance refining method, he refined the spirit puppet of the half-step transcendent realm.

However, he still underestimated the difficulty of refining the half-step Transcendent Realm Spirit Puppet.

Even if you understand everything, it's still easy to make mistakes when you actually do it.

And he made a mistake in the first refining, which caused these materials to be destroyed.

If it is another half-step extradimensional realm, it will definitely be distressing, because the value of these materials is comparable to most of the net worth of ordinary half-step extradimensional realms.

The second refining still failed.

However, for the third refining, he succeeded in the factory.
